title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 31 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 31/05/2022
Image reference: 2022-05-31_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-may-31-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Older Supramax values have firmed. Capesize Mount Nevis (177,000 DWT, Sep 2005, Namura) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 20.50 mil, VV Value USD 20.01 mil - DD Due. Capesize Stella Flora (176,300 DWT, Oct 2012, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to Safe Bulkers for USD 31.75 mil, VV Value USD 33.91 mil - SS Due.
